changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE INTERVIEW ( ID NUMBER CONSTRAINT PK_INTERVIEW PRIMARY KEY, APPLICATION_ID NUMBER CONSTRAINT NN_INT_APP_ID NOT NULL, SCHEDULED_AT TIMESTAMP CONSTRAINT NN_INT_SCHED_AT NOT NULL, DURATION_MINUTES NUMBER(5) DEFAULT 60, INTERVIEW_TYPE VARCHAR2(50), MEETING_LINK VARCHAR2(500), INTERVIEWER_NAME VARCHAR2(200), NOTES VARCHAR2(2000), FEEDBACK VARCHAR2(4000), STATUS VARCHAR2(30) DEFAULT 'SCHEDULED' CONSTRAINT NN_INT_STATUS NOT NULL, CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP CONSTRAINT NN_INT_CREATED_AT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT FK_INT_APPLICATION FOREIGN KEY (APPLICATION_ID) REFERENCES APPLICATION (ID) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT CHK_INT_STATUS CHECK (STATUS IN ( 'SCHEDULED','CONFIRMED','COMPLETED','CANCELLED','NO_SHOW')) )
